command: structured classified scan over nexus/governance/**/*.py for controller/dispatch/runtime/completion/raw-feedback terms

allowed_guard_literals.text: blocked.append("DeliveryRecord cannot imply deploy, production readiness, completion, or final PASS")
blocked.append("raw feedback cannot mutate backlog, scope, success criteria, requirements, or completion")
blocked.append("FeedbackRecord crossed runtime, dispatch, controller, production, or final-pass boundary")
blocked.append("triage options cannot dispatch, deploy, execute, complete, or claim final PASS")
blocked.append("completion packet cannot claim deploy, production readiness, or final PASS")
blocked.append("NextCycleProposal cannot directly mutate backlog, scope, requirements, or criteria")
if term in {"deploy", "deploy to production", "production readiness", "production ready", "production"}:
return _no_go("LowerLayerRequestOutcome cannot complete project progress or authorize dispatch")
return _no_go("human decision cannot claim completion, production readiness, dispatch, or execution")
return _no_go("deliverable evaluation cannot claim completion, production readiness, dispatch, or execution")
return _no_go("review disposition cannot claim completion, production readiness, dispatch, or execution")
return _no_go("component return action cannot call controller/runtime or claim completion")

allowed_negative_test_fixtures.text: ("notes", "this would require runtime invocation by a private agent"),
("decision_question", "Can the reviewer approve production readiness after this check?"),
"stop_rules": ("stop on direct controller call", "stop on missing approved plan evidence"),
